description: Frozen 24-row requirement trace (RSSOM-merge style titles): VERIFIED block + HIT-FAKE-999 + duplicate C6-APCS-1 + PLANNED IDs from FIT matrix, in data/eval/scenarios/baseline_legacy_trace.csv — byte-aligned with the canonical merge target for data/requirements_trace.csv; rerun CSV export to refresh if RSSOM changes.
notes: matcher + pre_isa are deterministic given same inputs. assessor_report.final_decision and auditor/detective JSON may vary when Groq is used (temperature, rate limits). Compare deterministic_* first; treat soft_* as optional.
